prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 5.3L LH8 V8 (300 hp, 320 lb-ft) with a GM Performance Parts LSA crate engine (6.2L supercharged, 580 hp, 556 lb-ft) paired with a Kenne Bell 2.8L Mammoth supercharger kit (12 psi boost, 750+ hp) and a custom billet aluminum intercooler from ProCharger. Upgrade fuel system with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1000X injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU for precise tuning.

Drivetrain: Install a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch and a custom fabricated aluminum driveshaft from Inland Empire Driveline. Replace the stock 4L60-E transfer case with a NP241C HD transfer case and upgrade axles to 4340 chromoly shafts from Yukon Gear & Axle with 4.88:1 gear ratios for off-road dominance.

Suspension & Handling: Swap the stock torsion bar front and multi-link rear suspension for a full King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilover system (14" travel front, 16" travel rear) with custom valving for rock crawling. Add a Currie Enterprises Antirock sway bar system (1.25" front, 1.5" rear) and Hutchinson beadlock wheels (17x9, -12mm offset) wrapped in 37x12.5R17 Nitto Trail Grappler tires.
estetica: Exterior: Install a custom widebody kit from Fab Fours (H3 Alpha-specific, 4" fender flares) with a carbon fiber hood from RBP (Rough Country) featuring a functional scoop for the supercharger. Replace the stock bumpers with a Fab Fours Vengeance front bumper (with integrated winch mount and Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED lights) and a rear bumper with a dual exhaust cutout for the custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system from MagnaFlow (409S mandrel-bent, polished tips).

Lighting: Retrofit the headlights with Morimoto XB LED projectors (HID-compatible, 5500K) and add a Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light bar (50" curved, amber lens) mounted on a custom fabricated roof rack from Prinsu Design Studio. Replace taillights with sequential LED units from Diode Dynamics (SL1 series, smoked housing).

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro SR-7 racing seats (HANS-compatible, 6-point harnesses from Schroth) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (DOM tubing, 1.75" x .120" wall thickness). Add a full Alcantara headliner and door cards from Katzkin, a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom gauge cluster from AIM Solo 2 DL (data logging, GPS, 8-inch display) with auxiliary gauges from AEM (boost, wideband AFR, oil pressure).
